case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. HILDA OLIVIA RODRIGUEZ AVILEZ

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-17-2018 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 55.00 - SERVED JUN-25-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT AVILEZ, HILDA OLIVIA RODRIGUEZ
